sql: UPDATE users u SET u.name = #{user.name}, u.email = #{user.email}, u.department = #{user.profile.department}, u.title = #{user.profile.title}, u.metadata = #{user.profile.metadata}, u.status = #{status} WHERE u.id IN (#{ids}) AND u.department_id IN (#{deptIds}) AND u.status != #{excludeStatus}
templateSql:
UPDATE users u
<set>
    <if test="user != null">
        <if test="user.name != null">
            <if test="user.name.length() > 0">
                u.name = #{user.name},
            </if>
        </if>
        <if test="user.email != null">
            <if test="user.email.contains('@')">
                u.email = #{user.email},
            </if>
        </if>
        <if test="user.profile != null">
            <if test="user.profile.department != null">
                u.department = #{user.profile.department},
            </if>
            <if test="user.profile.title != null">
                u.title = #{user.profile.title},
            </if>
            <if test="user.profile.metadata != null">
                u.metadata = #{user.profile.metadata},
            </if>
        </if>
    </if>
    <if test="status != null">
        u.status = #{status},
    </if>
</set>
<where>
    <if test="ids != null and ids.size() > 0">
        AND u.id IN
        <foreach collection="ids" item="id" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{id}
        </foreach>
    </if>
    <if test="deptIds != null and deptIds.size() > 0">
        AND u.department_id IN
        <foreach collection="deptIds" item="did" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{did}
        </foreach>
    </if>
    <if test="excludeStatus != null">
        AND u.status != #{excludeStatus}
    </if>
</where>
